_doc: Drives check-gate-integrity.mjs (CANON-AUDIT-PROTOCOL §8.7a). Audits the kit's own gates: every check-*.mjs in tools/ must ship a paired .test.mjs that proves it goes RED on a known-bad input. The meta-gate is itself a check-*.mjs, so it audits itself too. Consumers copy this template and point auditDir/gatePattern at their own gates. Skip-when-no-config: remove this file for a conscious N-A.
